items.title: When I got my cancer diagnosis, I had to cancel 3 planned vacations. A 1-night staycation in nearby Santa Cruz gave me the reset I needed.

items.title_zh: 当我确诊癌症时，不得不取消了三趟计划好的旅行。在邻近的圣克鲁兹短暂停留一晚，却给了我亟需的喘息机会。
